You are asked questions about a synthetic world. You are given NO background material — only the question itself. If you cannot know the answer, give your best guess in the required format anyway.
Answer format: for true/false questions reply with exactly one word, true or false. For list questions reply with a JSON array of entity IDs, e.g. ["customer_03","customer_07"], or [] if none.

Question: On day 360, across frames [actual, jurisdiction_01, product_20, product_15], list every sector value X such that operates_in(sector=?X, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_00, jurisdiction2=jurisdiction_09) holds, labeling each value with the frame it holds in. Answer as (value, frame) pairs (possibly empty).
Structured form: {"at_day":360,"find_slot":"sector","pattern":{"relation":"rel_b01_operates_in","args":{"jurisdiction":{"const":"jurisdiction_00"},"jurisdiction2":{"const":"jurisdiction_09"},"sector":{"var":"X"}}}}
